text.title: problem-validation-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for problem-validation-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating "I would definitely introduce you to my team" as a level-2 commitment signal.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Future-tense statements are level-4 interest at best. Level-2 commitment requires the introduction to have actually happened (past tense + evidence).

failure-mode.description: Agents skip the Weakness step when generating the opener, producing a confident pitch instead of a vulnerability statement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The Weakness step creates psychological safety for the respondent to give critical feedback. Without it, the opener reads as a pitch and respondents perform agreement.
